svg.title: HyperWeave Genomes — Triple Flow
svg.desc: Three rows of genome badges scrolling in alternating directions

hw:reasoning.hw:intent: Show genome diversity with three counter-scrolling rows for visual depth
hw:reasoning.hw:approach: Alternating scroll direction creates parallax depth; rotated genome order ensures different badges visible per row
hw:reasoning.hw:tradeoffs: 3x content vs single row — traded file size for richer visual presentation
